block_00: Thank you for submitting your Christmas wish
block_01: We asked you to send in your Christmas wish, and the response has been overwhelming! We are honored that you took the time to share your deepest hopes and dreams with us.
block_02: We are already busy making sure we read every Christmas wish submitted. The winners will be contacted in January, so stay tuned. In the meantime, we would like to say thank you for your participation — it truly means a lot to us.
block_03: Wishing you all the best in the coming year!
